title: Kotak Mahindra Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
